feed.title: Daily Digest
feed.subtitle: Quote, fact, life hack, fortune cookie, and headlines of the day

entry.title: Despite Trump's assurances, shippers wait and see on Strait of Hormuz
entry.content: President Trump says there's a "safe, secure and pristine" route through the Strait of Hormuz, but major shipping companies aren't convinced.

entry.title: Trump, Kemp choose opposing candidates in Georgia Republican Senate runoff election
entry.content: Voters across multiple states will cast their ballots today to decide local and state elections. Georgia voters will decide which candidates continue to the general election in several key runoff contests. CBS News' Fin Gómez has more context.

entry.title: Andrew Bird gets 'painfully sincere' at mental health benefit concert celebrating 'The Pitt'
entry.content: Intimacy was key to the sold-out "Andrew Bird and Friends" concert, which took over Largo to benefit mental health organizations for healthcare workers.

entry.title: World awaits U.S.-Iran nuclear negotiations as some Strait of Hormuz traffic resumes
entry.content: The U.S. and Iran are set to officially sign a framework agreement on Friday, as the world awaits the outcome of the nuclear negotiations expected to follow. CBS News' Nancy Cordes and Will Todman, a senior fellow at the Center for Strategic and International Studies, have more.

entry.title: Alleged plot targeting White House UFC event involved explosive drones, documents show
entry.content: The alleged plot targeting the White House's UFC event on Sunday involved drones and explosives, court documents show. At least one suspect, 19-year-old Tycen Proper, has been arrested in Ohio. CBS News' Jake Rosen has more.

entry.title: Feds reveal new details of alleged plot to attack White House UFC event
entry.content: The FBI said it disrupted an attempt to attack Sunday's UFC America 250 event at the White House, with court records detailing an alleged plot to use small drones carrying explosives.

entry.title: How Gavin Newsom's claims about a DOJ investigation could impact a potential 2028 presidential run
entry.content: California Gov. Gavin Newsom said that the Justice Department is investigating him and his wife in a video released Monday. CBS News California's Julie Watts breaks down how it might impact a potential 2028 presidential run for the popular Democrat.

entry.title: SpaceX to buy AI coding assistant Cursor for $60 billion
entry.content: The deal comes just days after SpaceX went public in the largest IPO in history, raising $75 billion to help fund its expansion.

entry.title: Live with a partner? You may be sharing more microbes than you think
entry.content: A large study finds you may share about a quarter of your oral and gut microbes with the people you live with. Should you worry? We asked the experts.

entry.title: Georgia and Alabama GOP runoffs and more primaries to watch today
entry.content: Voters are casting their ballots in four states and the District of Columbia on Tuesday, including the runoff race in Georgia to take on Democratic Sen. Jon Ossoff.

entry.title: Fox versus Telemundo: How hydration breaks and commercials are disrupting World Cup viewing
entry.content: When the World Cup kicked off last week, FIFA introduced hydration breaks, a mandated 3-minute window for players to rest. Many networks are utilizing this pause in the match as a new advertising window. Some soccer fans aren't happy with the viewing experience.

entry.title: KFC unveils brand revamp with new menu, drinks and store formats
entry.content: KFC unveils brand revamp with new menu, drinks and store formats

entry.title: Lam Research (LRCX) Stands Out on Strong Demand
entry.content: Lam Research (LRCX) Stands Out on Strong Demand

entry.title: Magnitude 6.3 earthquake rattles China, at least 1 dead, multiple injured
entry.content: Magnitude 6.3 earthquake rattles China, at least 1 dead, multiple injured

entry.title: I graduated from UC Berkeley with a job lined up, but I was quickly laid off. I found my next job by cold emailing.
entry.content: I graduated from UC Berkeley with a job lined up, but I was quickly laid off. I found my next job by cold emailing.

entry.title: U.S. Allies Use G-7 to Focus Trump’s Attention Back to Ukraine
entry.content: The president has spent the past four months focused on Iran, but the Group of Seven summit has left him little choice but to turn his attention back to Ukraine.

entry.title: US paying almost $25,000 a month to store unusable contraceptives stuck in Belgium
entry.content: US paying almost $25,000 a month to store unusable contraceptives stuck in Belgium

entry.title: 👵🏽 40 and clubless: granny becomes a star after epic match
entry.content: Vozinha, Cape Verde’s national team goalkeeper, had an unusual day as he became the biggest name at the World Cup this Monday (15).The 40-year-old veteran made crucial saves and was named man of the...

entry.title: Vote for the Treasure Coast's best boys athlete during the 2025-26 season
entry.content: We highlight 10 top high school boys athletes on the Treasure Coast. Vote for your favorite to be named Team of the Year.

entry.title: Serie A defender wants to wait for Barcelona despite Chelsea and Atletico Madrid interest
entry.content: Barcelona started the summer transfer window like a bullet train, moving ahead of everyone else to wrap up a deal for Newcastle United star Anthony Gordon.Slowly, though, since that deal happened, the...

entry.title: India orders temporary ban on Telegram over exam fraud concerns
entry.content: The restrictions include a nationwide ban on Telegram until June 22 and a requirement to disable the app's message editing feature.

entry.title: Hornchurch bring in Barnet defender Kizzi
entry.content: National League newcomers Hornchurch sign defender Joe Kizzi from League Two club Barnet.

entry.title: Harrogate sign midfielder Williams
entry.content: Harrogate Town sign King's Lynn midfielder Morgan Williams for an undisclosed fee on a two-year deal.

entry.title: Offside rule in soccer, explained: The simple definition and how referees still manage to get it wrong
entry.content: The Sporting News breaks down the offside rule, how it is enforced and why it's a part of the game.

entry.title: OMV Petrom moves ahead with Gabare project in Bulgaria
entry.content: OMV Petrom moves ahead with Gabare project in Bulgaria

entry.title: SpaceX to buy Cursor AI coding agent operator Anysphere for $60 billion
entry.content: SpaceX to buy Cursor AI coding agent operator Anysphere for $60 billion

entry.title: Criminals are buying stolen Medicare identities in bulk at $8 each — then fraudulently billing the government billions
entry.content: Criminals are buying stolen Medicare identities in bulk at $8 each — then fraudulently billing the government billions

entry.title: Ultra-rich Americans are turning to a $40 billion industry to help them flee the US. Here’s where they're going instead
entry.content: Ultra-rich Americans are turning to a $40 billion industry to help them flee the US. Here’s where they're going instead

entry.title: College baseball games on TV today: Full schedule, times, channels, streams to watch CWS Tuesday
entry.content: A pair of unexpected matchups are on tap as the CWS opens in Omaha.

entry.title: College World Series bracket 2026: Full schedule, scores, TV channels, live streams for NCAA baseball CWS
entry.content: This year's tournament in Omaha promises to be a thriller after a flurry of upsets earlier in the tournament. Here's when and where to watch every game.

entry.title: Norway's soccer chant, explained: The history behind 'Ro! Ro!' bringing viking energy to World Cup
entry.content: Here's the rundown on Norway's rattling chant that will likely be heard during the team's 2026 World Cup matches.

entry.title: Where to watch Australia vs. Turkey live stream, TV channel, start time for World Cup Group D match
entry.content: Here's how to watch the Australia vs. Turkey World Cup Group D Match, including live stream, TV channel, start time and more.

entry.title: Where to watch Iraq vs. Norway live stream, TV channel, start time for World Cup Group I match
entry.content: Iraq vs. Norway kickoff time: Here’s how to watch the World Cup match on TV and live stream. The Sporting News takes you through all the information you need to follow the game.

entry.title: Kevin Warsh's Fed debut comes at a pivotal moment for global monetary policy
entry.content: Kevin Warsh's Fed debut comes at a pivotal moment for global monetary policy

entry.title: Spain next World Cup match: Fixture schedule, start time, draw bracket as La Roja face Saudi Arabia
entry.content: Spain's World Cup schedule: When the European champions play their next match as Lamine Yamal, Pedri and company aim to progress from Group H.

entry.title: With war likely over, Iranian rulers must face demands of angry, embittered population
entry.content: With war likely over, Iranian rulers must face demands of angry, embittered population

entry.title: Supreme Court declines to hear Carter Page case against FBI officials
entry.content: The Supreme Court on Monday declined to take up Carter Page's case against former FBI officials who oversaw what the government now concedes was an ill-advised attempt to surveil his activities during the 2016 campaign.

entry.title: Promoter of election conspiracy theories wins GOP primary for Nevada secretary of state
entry.content: Former state lawmaker Jim Marchant has won the Republican nomination for Nevada secretary of state

entry.title: Online portal used to send US deliveries to Cuba stops taking orders
entry.content: A key platform that Cubans in the U.S. use to send money and goods to relatives in Cuba has stopped operations

entry.title: American doctor who recovered from Ebola back in U.S., says he's "feeling well"
entry.content: Dr. Peter Stafford, his wife, Rebekah Stafford, and their four children all arrived safely on Monday, according to Serge, a Pennsylvania-based Christian missions organization.

entry.title: 6/15: The Takeout with Major Garrett
entry.content: Details still slim on U.S.-Iran deal; California Gov. Gavin Newsom says the Justice Department is investigating him and his wife.

entry.title: 8 dead in B-52 bomber crash at Edwards Air Force Base in California, officials say
entry.content: The aircraft was on a routine test mission at Edwards airfield, located in the western Mojave Desert, about 100 miles northeast of Los Angeles.

entry.title: Middle East expert on U.S.-Iran deal
entry.content: An initial agreement between the U.S. and Iran to extend their shaky ceasefire is nearing formal signing. Mona Yacoubian, director of the Middle East program at the Center for Strategic and International Studies, joins with analysis.

entry.title: Teen accused of killing stepsister on cruise to be jailed pending trial
entry.content: The teen was initially released pending trial after being charged as a juvenile, but after he was charged as an adult, a judge ruled he was no longer subject to rules regarding juvenile detention.

entry.title: Parts of Texas bracing for more rain after flooding
entry.content: Thunderstorms in parts of central Texas caused severe flooding over the weekend, and more rain is on the way. CBS News correspondent Jason Allen has the latest.

entry.title: Fortune Cookie of the Day
entry.content:
It is easier to stay out than to get out.
Lucky Numbers: 37, 47, 61, 38, 85, 27

entry.title: Life Hack of the Day
entry.content: You can rub the inside of a banana skin on mosquito bites to stop the itchiness.

entry.title: Useless Fact of the Day
entry.content: Peanuts are one of the ingredients of dynamite.

entry.title: Quote of the Day — Lily Tomlin
entry.content: “The road to success is always under construction..” — Lily Tomlin

entry.title: Judge tosses out Dawn Richard's lawsuit against Sean 'Diddy' Combs
entry.content: A federal judge has dismissed singer Dawn Richard's lawsuit against Sean ‘Diddy’ Combs on the grounds that most of the allegations were not filed in time

entry.title: UN calls on Afghanistan's Taliban rulers to reverse crackdown on women
entry.content: The U.N. Security Council has unanimously adopted a resolution calling on Afghanistan’s Taliban rulers to swiftly reverse their crackdown on women

entry.title: Olivia Rodrigo's emotional L.A. pop-up celebrating her album was nothing short of a fantasy
entry.content: Ahead of the release of 'You Seem Pretty Sad for a Girl So in Love,' Olivia Rodrigo partnered with American Express to re-create the set of her music video 'The Cure' in a pop-up for fans.

entry.title: People in China are watching the World Cup differently this time
entry.content: A 12-hour-plus time difference and various streaming options are influencing how people in China watch the World Cup.

entry.title: RFK Jr under fire for ‘bullying’ letter to scientific journal
entry.content: Health advocates criticized Kennedy’s move demanding answers from journal that removed ‘flawed’ vaccine studyRobert F Kennedy Jr, the US health secretary, is demanding answers from a medical journal that recently removed a paper suggesting a link between vaccines and infant death, saying their decision was “of great interest to me”.Public health advocates immediately criticized the move, and said Kennedy appeared to be trying to intimidate and influence the journal’s editorial process. The journal Toxicology Reports had removed the paper this spring after editors determined it was so seriously flawed it could harm patients and pose a risk to public health. Continue reading...

entry.title: Judge tosses out Dawn Richard's lawsuit against Sean 'Diddy' Combs
entry.content: A federal judge has tossed out singer Dawn Richard's lawsuit against Sean 'Diddy' Combs, saying most of her claims of emotional and physical abuse, including groping, were not filed in the required year after the described events.

entry.title: It’s common to hear there’s ‘no money’ in healthcare. But sometimes it’s management that’s lacking | Ranjana Srivastava
entry.content: A report into Melbourne’s Cohealth showed systemic problems were left unaddressed for a decade, while ideas from clinicians went ignoredOne cancer patient is advised to increase fluids, another sent an electronic script, and a third consoled. All have been saved from an emergency presentation by the timely intervention of a nurse – in just the first hour of the day.So, imagine my dismay when she warns me that her clinic will close for several weeks when she takes overdue leave. Thinking selfishly of my neediest patients, I ask why there’s no cover.Ranjana Srivastava is an Australian oncologist, award-winning author and Fulbright scholar. Her latest book is Every Word Matters: Writing to Engage the Public Continue reading...

entry.title: Eight Crew Members Believed Dead in B-52 Bomber Crash at California Air Base
entry.content: The crash, which occurred shortly after takeoff at Edwards Air Force Base, is under investigation.

entry.title: 1-year-old child killed and 1 person injured after Mississippi police shoot at car
entry.content: A 1-year-old boy is dead and another person wounded after a Mississippi police officer shot at a vehicle while responding to a shoplifting call, according to authorities and the child's grandfather.

entry.title: CFTC chair Selig defends decision to approve ‘perps’ in U.S.
entry.content: Michael Selig said that incumbents will always fear the future, but it's important to develop the new asset class domestically rather than only offshore.

entry.title: Former Louisville police officer charged with manslaughter in fatal shooting of naked man
entry.content: A former Louisville police officer who resigned last week was charged by a grand jury Monday with manslaughter for fatally shooting a naked man while responding to an alleged assault.

entry.title: Alfredo sauce distributed to dozens of states recalled due to potential salmonella contamination
entry.content: Federal health officials have issued a recall for alfredo sauce distributed to dozens of U.S. states by a supplier because of potential salmonella contamination.

entry.title: Stocks Have Even More Room to Fly if Hormuz Reopens
entry.content: Oil prices fell, bonds rallied and the Dow industrials closed at a record after President Trump announced a deal to end the war with Iran.

entry.title: The US government’s Anthropic models ban was never about an AI jailbreak
entry.content: The Trump administration's decision that forced Anthropic to pull its latest cybersecurity models could be reactionary, retaliatory, or both, but the message is clear: The AI industry isn't immune from U.S. government interference.

entry.title: Google Earth's flight simulator mode is now available in your browser
entry.content: Up, up and away! (Just try not to crash.)

entry.title: Israel Is Alarmed by Trump’s Deal With Iran
entry.content: Officials are wrestling with the consequences of easing the pressure on Tehran and the risks of opening a rift with the U.S. over Lebanon.

entry.title: Where to watch Iran vs. New Zealand live stream, TV channel, start time for World Cup Group G match
entry.content: Iran vs. New Zealand kickoff time: Here’s how to watch the World Cup match on TV and live stream. The Sporting News takes you through all the information you need to follow the game.

entry.title: Do the Spurs need to shake it up? Why San Antonio shouldn't overreact to NBA Finals disappointment
entry.content: The Spurs arrived sooner than expected. Now it's on them to climb even higher.

entry.title: Belgium vs. Egypt box score: Full stats from World Cup Group G match as Kevin De Bruyne faces Mo Salah
entry.content: It promises to have some serious star power.

entry.title: Jets minicamp might provide an answer to big No. 2 receiver question
entry.content: This is going to be a very interesting outcome for the Jets this summer.

entry.title: Alphonso Davies still limited in practice as Canada prepares to face Qatar at the World Cup
entry.content: Canada captain Alphonso Davies remained limited in the team's World Cup training session on Monday as he recovers from a hamstring injury. Davies warmed up with the team at Canada's training base but remained in return to play protocol ahead of the co-host's second group match on Thursday against Qatar at BC Place in Vancouver. The left back injured a hamstring last month while playing for Bayern Munich in 1-1 draw with Paris Saint-Germain that knocked the German club out of the Champions League semifinals.

entry.title: PWHL expansion team in Las Vegas hires former AHL assistant Kim Weiss to be its coach
entry.content: The PWHL’s expansion team in Las Vegas made it official on Monday by naming Kim Weiss as coach. The 37-year-old Weiss makes the jump to the women’s game after completing her second season as an assistant with the American Hockey League's Colorado Eagles. The team lost Game 7 of the AHL Western Conference finals to Chicago last week.

entry.title: Who is Saudi Arabia's goalie? Meet Mohammed Al-Owais, who is already a World Cup hero
entry.content: Al-Owais showed what he was made of against Argentina and Mexico during the 2022 FIFA World Cup.

entry.title: Jalen Brunson Eyes ‘Law & Order: Special Victims Unit’ Cameo After Knicks’ Historic Championship Win
entry.content: When Mariska Hargitay isn’t fighting crime as Olivia Benson on Law & Order: Special Victims Unit, she’s cheering at the top of her lungs for the New York Knicks. Now, the team’s star says he wants to step into her world. Jalen Brunson — the point guard who captained the Knicks to their first NBA […]

entry.title: Christian Pulisic Makes Himself at Home on the West Coast as He Leaves Behind $3.8 Million Florida Mansion to Lead the U.S. in World Cup
entry.content: Pulisic, who plays for AC Milan, as well as the U.S. national team, spends the off-season in Florida, where he owns a waterfront mansion.

entry.title: Alabama vs Texas baseball box score: Live stats from College World Series
entry.content: Alabama and Texas face off for the 16th time.

entry.title: Pitching woes lead to the Pirates' massive slide in latest power rankings
entry.content: A ballooned ERA has not helped the Pirates lately.

entry.title: Islam Makhachev on Topuria's UFC title loss: 'He who exalts himself will be humbled'
entry.content: UFC welterweight champion Islam Makhachev was glad to see Ilia Topuria humbled at UFC Freedom 250.

entry.title: Where to watch Wisconsin high school baseball playoffs: Schedule, channel, live stream for WIAA state tournament
entry.content: State champions will be crowned across four divisions in Wisconsin this week. Here's when and where to watch every game.

entry.title: Zayas vs. Boots Start Time, Full Fight Card
entry.content: Event: Xander Zayas vs. Boots EnnisDate: Sat., June 27, 2026Location: Barclays Center in Brooklyn, New YorkStart Time: DAZN PPV main card start time at 6 p.m. ET Zayas vs. Boots Main Event on DAZN PPV: 154 lbs.: Xander Zayas (23-0) vs. ‘Boots’ Ennis (35-0) for Zayas’s WBO, WBA Junior Middleweight titles Zayas vs. Boots Undercard […]

entry.title: Matches To Make After UFC Freedom 250
entry.content: UFC Freedom 250 went down in the history books last night (Sat., June 14, 2026) in what was truly one-of-a kind event that saw all seven fights end via knockout. In the main event of the evening, Justin Gaethje became the undisputed Lightweight champion of the world after he absolutely brutalized Ilia Topuria to the […]

entry.title: Iran vs. New Zealand live score, stats, result, highlights from 2026 World Cup Group G match
entry.content: The Sporting News is tracking live scoring updates and highlights for Iran vs. New Zealand in the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Follow for complete results from the Group G match in Los Angeles.

entry.title: Meet the 40-year-old goalkeeper who blanked Spain in Cape Verde’s historic draw
entry.content: At one point toward the end of the first half of the match between Spain and Cape Verde on Monday afternoon, it became apparent that Vozinha, the Cape Verde goalkeeper, was up for the challenge of facing one of the most talented, successful teams in the world

entry.title: Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha was moved to tears after masterful game against Spain
entry.content: The 40-year-old played the game of his life at the World Cup.

entry.title: Participants, teams set for Top 100 Underclass Girls Basketball Showcase at Ben Davis
entry.content: Here are the participants for Thursday's IHSAA / IBCA Girls Top 100 Showcase at Ben Davis.

entry.title: Unexpected Brewers success against star pitchers, like Blake Perkins
entry.content: Blake Perkins has amazing numbers against Phillies star Christopher Sánchez in a small sample, and these other surprising Brewers also dominated aces.

entry.title: Wizards C Alex Sarr reportedly has surgery on fractured right foot, but expected to be ready for 2026-27 season
entry.content: Sarr was limited to 48 games last season due to hamstring and toe injuries. He missed Washington's final nine games.

entry.title: 400 million watched it: RCB-GT final becomes most-watched IPL match ever
entry.content: The season ended with Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) defeating Gujarat Titans by five wickets in the final at Ahmedabad to win their second successive IPL title.

entry.title: Ilia Topuria Breaks Silence After Savage TKO Loss To Justin Gaethje
entry.content: Ilia Topuria responded to the first loss of his career, a fourth-round TKO against Justin Gaethje at UFC Freedom 250, with a classy message and a promise of a rematch.

entry.title: Ilia Topuria issues first comments following brutal UFC Freedom 250 loss to Justin Gaethje on White House lawn
entry.content: Sunday's White House upset marked Topuria’s first professional loss and left the pound-for-pound star nearly unrecognizable, with both eyes swollen closed and his face a battered mess.

entry.title: Open-source Discord alternatives: What Stoat and Element actually fix
entry.content: Hosting your own group chat could let you avoid a lot of drama.

entry.title: Xbox Game Studios chief reportedly steps down as layoffs loom
entry.content: Things continue to look grim for Xbox as layoffs loom and Craig Duncan steps down.

entry.title: EA created an entire division to push more in-game ads
entry.content: EA is making a big push for more in-game advertising.

entry.title: Why Dana White said there is 'no f—ing way' he's ever putting on UFC White House card again
entry.content: After a successful but expensive event at the White House, here's what White said about a potential return.

entry.title: Lakers linked to former $147 million Warriors All-Star forward, NBA champion
entry.content: An NBA pundit thinks the Los Angeles Lakers could land an ex-Golden State Warriors standout contributor this summer.

entry.title: How De'Aaron Fox's contract and Dylan Harper's emergence will leave Spurs no choice
entry.content: Dylan Harper is the future, and Fox is in his way.

entry.title: Sidney Crosby trade plans did a 180 for Penguins
entry.content: The 2025-26 season was a roller coaster for the captain of Pittsburgh and Canada.

entry.title: Red Sox getting breakout from 2.70 ERA lefty is biggest surprise of 2026 season
entry.content: This young left-hander has been a big positive amid a disaster 2026 season.
